message:
perf(encode/folding): avoid cloning folded_key when there's no path prefix

Switch the `absolute_path` local in `try_fold_key_chain` from `String`
to `Cow<'_, str>`. The common no-prefix branch had been eagerly cloning
`folded_key` via `.clone()`; with `Cow::Borrowed(folded_key.as_str())`
the borrow flows through the subsequent `root_keys.contains(...)` check
(now passing `absolute_path.as_ref()`) without touching the allocator
on the hot path. The prefixed branch still allocates once via
`Cow::Owned(format!(...))`, which matches the previous behavior.

Adds `use std::borrow::Cow` at the top of the module. No API or
observable-behavior changes — `root_keys` is checked via
`&str` comparisons either way.
